description: Since this morning I cannot access my account. Password reset email never received. I have a payment due tonight.
I would like to update my delivery address for my next order before it ships tomorrow.
Your application keeps crashing every time I try to open it. This has been happening for 3 days. I will cancel my subscription if not fixed.
My last invoice shows 150 EUR but I should have been charged 99 EUR according to my plan. Please correct this urgently.
It would be great to have a dark mode option in the settings. Many users have been requesting this.
